'''Circarpous XIV''' was the fourteenth and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous]] [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Its fifth moon had extensive [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] activity which kept it warm and habitable.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] maintained a [[Rebel base (Circarpous XIV)|secret base]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] which served as nexus for operations on [[Circarpous III]] and [[Circarpous IV]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 1|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 1]] {{Mo}}
